keyPoints: Foundational textbook for automata theory and formal languages
Co-author with Rajeev Motwani and Jeffrey Ullman
Covers central topics like Turing machines, decidability, and complexity classes
commonMistakes: Confusing 'Introduction to Automata Theory' with his later 'Introduction to the Theory of Computation'
Assuming all theoretical concepts are purely abstract with no practical application
Overlooking the importance of exercises in building intuition for proofs
